1: A year of intrigue, deception, and depression. The birth of children (or grandchildren) brings a minor decline; betrayals and lawsuits are possible. There is a risk of imprisonment, so avoid any form of fraud; neither take nor offer bribes.
10:
An unsuccessful year marked by a decline in your inner and psychological state. The birth of children (or grandchildren) and difficulties in your personal life are likely, along with a high risk of miscarriage, ectopic pregnancy, abortion, complications during childbirth, threats to the pregnancy, cesarean section, or hemorrhage. If you do conceive, guard your health carefully.
Conclusion: women are not advised to conceive during a -1 or -10 year, as complications during childbirth may arise. After 10, reduce to a single digit: 1+0=-1, and consult the additional reading for -1.
11: Strong competition at work, with the loss of money and clients. Additionally, reduce: 1+1=2. A -2 year brings the loss of a relationship with a close person and a period of energetic decline. You must show patience and seek compromise, placing your emphasis on relationships.
12: Strong competition at work, with the loss of money and clients. Additionally, reduce: 1+2=3. A -3 year is a time of mistaken decisions when your intuition fails you. Act by the principle of measuring seven times before cutting once.
13:
A year of betrayals, with a risk of oncological illness (check your health) and the loss of real estate. Imprisonment is possible for officials and entrepreneurs. The factor of surprise operates throughout the entire year: any new person or event may bring destruction. Do not take or offer bribes, and do not engage in fraud. Stay cautious, as you may be set up. Reduce additionally: 1+3=4, and consult -4.
-4 brings danger to your health, a year of declining health and conflict situations. Avoid extreme sports and drive carefully. Check your health and take preventive measures; cosmetic, plastic, and other elective surgeries are not recommended. There is a health risk, and recovery may be very prolonged or accompanied by complications.
14: A heavy, ruinous time with yet another betrayal. Imprisonment (for politicians) is possible. Do not relocate, take out loans, or conceive. Be as cautious as possible. This is an unfavorable program; a karmic forecast for every 5 days plus a biorhythm reading is recommended.

2: The loss of a relationship with a close person, a year of energetic decline. You must show patience and seek compromise, placing your emphasis on relationships.
3: A year of mistaken decisions when your intuition fails you. Act by the principle of measuring seven times before cutting once.
4: Danger to your health, a year of declining health and conflict situations. Avoid extreme sports and drive carefully. 5: The loss of property, a year of spiritual decline (you should visit spiritual places). Neither sell nor buy anything. Insure your property; there is a high risk of infidelity and divorce, with deceptive relations between men and women. Beware of betrayals in business from the opposite sex.
6: The loss of work, a year of material decline, family disagreements, and health problems, with a risk of losing your job. At work, weigh every word carefully and attend diligently to your professional duties. During this period you may resign, but finding new work will be difficult. The loss of work, the loss of money, and betrayals in business; trust no one.
7: A spiritual crisis and depression, a year of family troubles and difficulties at work, the birth of children (or grandchildren). A spiritual crisis, a year of depression and self-analysis, with a risk of divorce, though you should not separate. A year of spiritual crisis.
8: The loss of money, a year of career decline with a risk of financial loss. During this period, do not lend money, make large purchases, invest, or take out loans and mortgages; instead, build a financial cushion. The loss of money and total misfortune.
9: A year that may bring collapse in all your affairs (business, career), a major decline, though it carries no specific events of its own. A year of mistaken decisions, with betrayals in business and in money matters. Trust no one.
